verse.name: v1
verse.lines: What we need is the Pillar of Fire Leading the church of God again Leading Her back to the Bible Leading Her away from sin Showing the resurrected Savior Showing Himself alive again What we need is the Pillar of Fire Burning in the hearts of men.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The Pillar of Fire led the children of Israel, Led them out of Egypt's land Led them to the Rock with the Water Led them to the Manna in God's hand Led them to God's holy mountain Where God chose to speak unto them But He wasn't finished there yet He led them to the Promised Land

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The early church and the Pillar of Fire Leading each and everyday Showing to all the sinners That Jesus is the only Way Without the Blood there is no salvation Without the Spirit there is no life What we need is the Pillar of Fire Burning in the hearts of men
